title: nachoneko PVP Resource Packs
description: A custom texture pack designed specifically for PVP.
body:
# nachoneko PVP Resource Packs
A fully transparent, cute-style PVP-exclusive texture pack. The transparent design provides a clean, unobstructed competitive view, balancing practical performance with visual healing.
![Inventory screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c1b44a0285f4bc64bec48abff0ad092f8e4a539a_0.webp)
## ● Based on game version
≥ Minecraft 1.20
## with the "Textured sword" suffix
![Textured sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eb4dec47d1eeaede69a4299281463cb5fd397868_0.webp)![Textured sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/644bd0235d3b828eb0995bc846624b5f4ed53039_0.webp)
